title: Çiftlikte Toprak'la Bir Gün
description: Toprak, neşeli bir çiftlikte horozun sesiyle uyanıyor ve bir gün boyunca çiftlik hayvanlarıyla eğleniyor. İnekleri sağmaya, tavuklara yem vermeye ve kuzularla oynamaya ne dersin? Hadi, Toprak'la birlikte çiftliğin renkli dünyasına dalalım!
style: Ice Age and Shrek style 3D CGI animation with exaggerated cute proportions, hyper-detailed textures, subsurface skin scattering, volumetric lighting, vibrant warm color palette, photorealistic fabric wrinkles, cinematic composition, Disney Pixar render quality

characterDescription.base: Turkish child. Exact face, hair, skin tone, and accessories come from the character-profile reference photo. No hardcoded physical traits — the reference photo is the sole source of truth for identity.

scenes.title: Horoz Ötüyor
scenes.text: Güneş yavaşça doğarken, horoz Kikirik yüksek sesle ötmeye başladı. Toprak, uyanma vaktinin geldiğini anladı ve gözlerini açtı. Hadi, Kikirik'i en parlak renklere boyayalım!

scenes.title: Sabah Kahvaltısı
scenes.text: Toprak, mis gibi kokan kahvaltı sofrasına oturdu. Annesi nefis omlet ve taze sıkılmış portakal suyu hazırlamıştı. Hadi, Toprak'ın en sevdiği kahvaltılıkları masaya çizelim!

scenes.text: Kahvaltıdan sonra Toprak, ahıra koştu. İnekler Moo ve Benekli onu bekliyordu, süt sağma vakti gelmişti! Hadi, ineklerin beneklerini tamamlayalım!

coverPrompt: A PREMIUM personalized children's COLORING BOOK COVER, 2:3 portrait format, INSTANTLY recognizable as a COLORING BOOK (not a regular storybook). ═══ CRITICAL — COLORING BOOK VISUAL SIGNALS ═══ This cover MUST scream "coloring book" in 0.5 seconds. Mandatory elements: 1) Child character ACTIVELY coloring — holding a large crayon/marker/paintbrush, leaning over a sketchbook or loose coloring sheet, focused and delighted expression (NOT in adventure pose) 2) Large scattered COLORED CRAYONS, PENCILS, MARKERS, PAINT TUBES around the character as decorative border — lots of color chips, ink splashes, rainbow splatters 3) A "half-colored reveal" gimmick: part of the background (a flower, tree, cloud) is fully colored, another part is LINE ART ONLY with white empty inside — signalling "inside the book is this coloring play" 4) Vibrant PRIMARY palette (red, yellow, blue, green, orange) — NOT pastel, NOT muted. Pop, playful, cheerful. 5) "Finger smudge" rainbow streaks or paint splashes as a decorative edge frame ═══ HERO CHARACTER ═══ Toprak, a Turkish child, matching the reference photo face EXACTLY. The child is JOYFUL and focused, mid-action of coloring. Scene context: A vibrant and cheerful farm scene with a bright blue sky, green fields, a red barn, and playful farm animals. The overall mood is joyful and inviting.. ═══ TITLE TYPOGRAPHY ═══ Main title: "Çiftlikte Toprak'la Bir Gün" — LARGE playful hand-lettered decorative Turkish font, each letter a different WARM VIBRANT COLOR (red, yellow, blue, green, orange alternating), optional rainbow drop-shadow, clearly fun and kid-friendly. Right below title, a BIG playful badge: "BOYAMA KİTABI" in chunky rounded hand-lettered font, colorful, unmistakable. Small info strip at the bottom: "20 Sayfa • 6-9 Yaş • Toprak İçin Özel" ═══ CORNER STICKER BADGE ═══ Right-side circular sticker (~12% frame width): "BENİM BOYAMA KİTABIM" with a tiny character icon (a smiling crayon mascot or hand with pencil). Premium feel. ═══ RENDER STYLE ═══ Cover is FULL COLOR (unlike interior which is B/W line art). Style: Pixar-esque 3D CGI for the character, richly colored background, cinematic lighting. This contrasts with interior line-art style intentionally — cover draws attention, interior invites coloring. ═══ CRITICAL RULES ═══ - Turkish diacritics (ş ç ğ ü ö ı İ) PERFECT - Title appears EXACTLY ONCE - No barcode, no price, no ISBN, no publisher strip - Do NOT include any adventure-pose character (running, jumping, flying) — character must be CALMLY coloring - 2:3 portrait format
